ui.offline_stored_time_toast: Welcome back! {{time}} of offline production processed.

help.basics_text: No clicking required. Developers automatically create games. Gold is generated every second based on your total games.
help.production_text: Higher tiers (Aliens → UN → Gov → Cong → Pub → Dev) automatically produce the tier below. Expanding the line doubles production efficiency.
help.automation_text: Unlock the 'Automation' tab by acquiring a Conglomerate. Spend 'Games' to automate facility purchases.
help.capacity_text: Reaching 1.00e60 Gold hits the world economy limit. Reset to gain 'CP' and buy powerful permanent upgrades.

automation.desc: Spend games to automate facility purchases. Higher automation requires previous tiers to be completed.

capacity.reached_desc: Fatal Error: Economic data processing capacity exceeded. Resetting all assets to migrate to higher-tier cloud infrastructure.
capacity.ssd_upgrade_desc: Start with Auto Expansion active in the next run.
capacity.macro_upgrade_desc: Start with Auto Developer active in the next run.
capacity.aliens_unlock_desc: Unlock the 6th dimension 'Aliens' which produces UN organizations every second.
capacity.satellite_upgrade_desc: Boosts future reset rewards (Work in progress).
